texto: The shoes of leadership have many ways to pinch and blister the feet of those who walk in them. But here's the thing, when we do walk in them despite the difficulties and challenges, our gait gradually changes from an ungainly, self-conscious toddle to a poised, purposeful stride that inspires trust in those who follow.
explicacao: Citação de Jodi Detrick sobre temas ligados a lideranca. “The shoes of leadership have many ways to pinch and blister the feet of those who walk in them. B…” articula lideranca, christian-leaders, leadership-development em registro de lideranca, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e mudanca.
